checked_sources: OpenStax Elementary Algebra 2e Ch 10.1-10.3 reference listed in course JSON
Khan Academy quadratic equations practice and quadratic formula video references listed in course JSON
findings: Module title, order, objectives, and assignment align with the published Algebra I course JSON for Module 14 (Quadratic Equations). The assignment of twelve equations split four-four-four across factoring, completing the square, and the quadratic formula matches the course JSON exactly.
No AP, College Board, Common App, CEEB, accreditation, NCAA, or college-admissions claims appear in the lesson narration, slides, or metadata.

No sourced or generated bitmap images are used; the standard-form card, zero-product diagram, three-step factoring recipe, completing-the-square trace, quadratic formula plate, discriminant table, rearrange-first trap, and both pause answer-reveals are all drawn deterministically in build_slides.py.
No URLs are read aloud in the narration; resources are referenced by name (OpenStax, Khan Academy).
Title and description guidance remains conservative and GIIS-owned; foundation-only framing matches the playbook and no script.json.youtube block is present.

Resource set in source_packet.json (Khan Academy quadratic equations practice, OpenStax Elementary Algebra 2e Ch 10, Khan Academy quadratic formula video) is free/usable and matches the course JSON references.
